content:
In my opinion, it's a 10/10! I'll wait a bit before validating, in case another player has an idea for improvement... personally, I don't have any! :D

EDIT: Oh, maybe review test pairs 1 and 4 so that validator better matches the difficulty of the related test.

Thank you! Regarding your suggestion for test pairs 1 and 4, that makes total sense—aligning the validator with the specific difficulty of those tests will definitely make for a smoother experience. I will get on that and make those adjustments a bit later today.
